name: Tripp Lite 750VA 450W Standby UPS - Ultra-compact Desk-mount - 4 Hour Recharge - 2.50 Minute Stand-by - 110 V AC Input - 120 V AC Output - USB - 12 x NEMA 5-15R - 6 x Battery/Surge Outlet (INTERNET750U)

description: A compact 750VA desk-mount standby UPS with 12 outlets for ultra-compact workspaces requiring portable power backup.
